arts.ttl: Manchester United 'progress and promise' spotted despite Tottenham loss as errors slammed
arts.sum: Man United were knocked out of the League Cup on Thursday night as Ruben Amorim's side fell to a dramatic 4-3 defeat to their Premier League rivals

arts.ttl: Man Utd news: Ruben Amorim makes BOLD Antony promise despite "confidence" issue
arts.sum: If you remember the Antony I played against him in Ajax, he lacks a bit of confidence to go one against one but he will improve. Ruben Amorim has vowed to help Antony after admitting that Manchester United ’s second-most expensive signing of all time “needs more confidence.”

arts.ttl: Alejandro Garnacho told to seek advice from Man United teammate - but it's not Marcus Rashford
arts.sum: Manchester United wingers Marcus Rashford and Alejandro Garnacho were left out of the squad to face Manchester City last weekend but the latter returned on Thursday night

arts.ttl: Jadon Sancho shows true Man United colours with Marcus Rashford defence after exit comments
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford's Manchester United future in certain, with the 27-year-old forward linked with a move away from Old Trafford after hinting he is ready to leave the club

arts.ttl: Man United head coach Ruben Amorim insists he is fully behind under-fire attacker
arts.sum: Manchester United head coach Ruben Amorim says that Antony "needs more confidence", with the forward's struggles at Old Trafford continuing.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim copies Sir Alex Ferguson at Man United despite Marcus Rashford personal feelings
arts.sum: Manchester United winger Marcus Rashford has been left out of Ruben Amorim's last two squads in all competitions

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim uses Manchester United programme notes to make a point amid Marcus Rashford saga
arts.sum: It is unclear if Marcus Rashford will be back in the Man United squad for their Premier League fixture against Bournemouth at Old Trafford.

arts.ttl: ‘Missed opportunity’ – Analysts feel bad for Manchester United man, may not be Premier League quality
arts.sum: Antony can consider his performance for Manchester United against Tottenham as a missed opportunity, with it doubtful if he’ll ever be Premier League quality. That’s according to Frank de Boer and Ron Vlaar, via FC Update, who have criticised the Brazilian today after Manchester United’s 4-3 defeat to Tottenham in the EFL Cup quarterfinals. arts.ttl: Marcus Rashford 'surprised' Man United stars as reaction to transfer admission says it all
arts.sum: Manchester United forward Marcus Rashford has admitted he's open to leaving the club in order to seek a new challenge - a confession that reportedly surprised his team-mates

arts.ttl: How to follow and match preview for Man Utd v Bournemouth
arts.sum: The South Coast outfit had to score late to secure a point against West Ham United at the Vitality Stadium last time out, with Enes Unal converting a brilliant free-kick from long range. United have won five of our seven Premier League home games against Bournemouth, and will want to wrap up a sixth just in time for Christmas.
